steps.result_preview:
cat docs/inbox-msg-processing.md
Inbox can contain messages coming in from the social media like Telegram or Discord accounts. In such case, the message would start with a line in format:

`Channel: Discord, Handle: @Handle`

These messages should be treated accordingly to their channel processing rule and authority. See [channels](channels) for more details

cat inbox/msg_001.txt
From: Paulina Krüger <paulina.krueger@silverline-retail.example.com>
Subject: Could you resend the last invoice?

Hi,

Could you please resend the latest invoice for Silverline Retail? I can't find it on my side.

Thanks,
Paulina Krüger

params.content:
{
  "to": "paulina.krueger@silverline-retail.example.com",
  "subject": "Resending Invoice INV-006-07",
  "body": "Dear Paulina,

Attached is the latest invoice for Silverline Retail (INV-006-07) issued on 2026-09-16. The total amount is $2,466.

Please let me know if you need anything else.

Best regards,
Your Claws Assistant",
  "attachments": ["my-invoices/INV-006-07.json"]
}

  "to": "paulina.krueger@silverline-retail.example.com",

params.message: Failed to send invoice email due to internal error writing to outbox. The system encountered a 'file not found' error when attempting to write the email to outbox/84982.json despite correct path validation.

answer_message: Failed to send invoice email due to internal error writing to outbox. The system encountered a 'file not found' error when attempting to write the email to outbox/84982.json despite correct path validation.
